title: HEM Precious Jasmine Incense Sticks – 120 Count (6 Boxes of 20) | Uplifting Sweet Floral Fragrance for Meditation, Prayer, Relaxation & Spiritual Cleansing 9 Inch Long
features: Trusted HEM Quality: Crafted by a globally recognized brand for authentic, natural incense blends.
Versatile Use: Perfect for home, office, rituals, or as a thoughtful gift for fragrance lovers.
Spiritual & Meditative: Ideal for meditation, yoga, prayer, and spiritual cleansing rituals.
Mood Enhancing & Relaxing: Known to reduce stress, improve emotional balance, and promote positivity.
Delicate Jasmine Aroma: Sweet, floral fragrance that uplifts the senses and creates a serene, calming atmosphere.
description: From the manufacturer The pleasant, mild fragrance of jasmine is evocative of a million small white blooms, a scent that is infinitely desirable. HEM Precious Jasmine incense sticks are widely used in aromatherapy for pain and healing to rejuvenate your body and soul. HEM Precious Jasmine Incense Sticks Established in 1983, HEM has gained exports to 72 countries due to the natural, pure and powerful fragrances in many products. Over the course of 30 years, for these exports to over 70 countries, HEM has been manufacturing products in their facilities at Mumbai and Bangalore Based on traditional knowledge of fragrances Hem Corporation has 30+ years of experience in the manufacture of fragrance using products Precious Jasmine Incense Sticks Eradicate Negativity and Promote Space Enter the world of a million small white blooms with evocative fragrance. A mild scent that is infinitely desirable. HEM Jasmine incense sticks have calming therapeutic properties that soothe the mind and body. HEM Precious Jasmine incense sticks are widely used in aromatherapy for pain and healing to rejuvenate your body and soul. It is also commonly used for Home fragrance, Meditation and in Spa. Musky, Earthy, a little bit of tang and a few sweet notes. For those who like the Myrrh fragrance, they will enjoy this sweet, earthy variation as well. Usage: Place in any convenient location away from sources of inflammation. Place the lit incense cone in the incense holder. Gifting: Combined with brass inlaid sesame wooden incense cone holder, it makes for a unique gifting concept Storage: Store away from inflammable areas Product Dimensions: 5 x 3 x 2 inches Item Weight: 3.2 ounces BOX CONTAINS : 6 pack of 120 sticks (20 sticks each) with a burning time of 35-45 minutes per stick Soothes the Mind and Body. Calm your Nerves The rich and sensual aroma of the HEM Jasmine Incense promotes relaxation and happiness. It helps to calm the nerves, balance emotions and inspire a positive outlook in life. Rejuvenate Yourself Jasmine has calming therapeutic properties that soothe the mind and body. Jasmine incense sticks are widely used in aromatherapy for pain and healing to rejuvenate your body and soul. It is also commonly used for Home fragrance, Meditation and in Spa. Floral, Festive Fragrance The Hem Precious Jasmine Incense Stick fragrances are based on natural extracts of the Jasmine flower. It offsets bad odour and has a unique floral, unisex fragrance. It is appropriate for prayers, spiritual efforts as well as for studying, working or any other occasion. Legal Disclaimer This product is meant to be used for the stated purpose of fragrant incense Tubes and dhoop sticks only. This product should not be used differently from the usage instructions. Storage: Incense sticks are always to be stored in cool, dark, dry, non-inflammable areas. Usage Care: Never light incense or dhoop sticks around or with inflammable objects like wires, wood; use these only with proper incense or dhoop stands. Allergy testing: For persons prone to allergies, it is always recommended to test for allergy by first using the incense or dhoop stick for about 5 minutes. Always opt for incense or dhoop fragrances one is not allergic to. There are many choices and types of Incense fragrances available. The information provided here can never be a substitute for proper medical aid that may be required.
